Off Calendar Apr-24-2009 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Ex Parte Petition To Withdraw Funds From Blocked Account
Off Calendar Apr-20-2009 Continued To Apr-24-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Meyers for Cesar Barrera (Petitioner). Oscar Barrera (Guardian Ad Litem in the civil case) in Propria Persona. Anna Barrera (Guardian Ad Litem in the worker's comp matter) in Propria Persona. Alejandra Sosa Siroka (Certified Spanish Interpreter).

The Court will approve a withdrawal of funds to pay $2,652.67 for Attorney's fees and costs, $19,637.00 for medicines purchased, $20,320.68 to Gilroy's Learning Services Corp. and the cost of the vehicle which is to be determined. Mr. Meyers will submit supporting documentation for consideration of the travel expenses and a document written in Spanish to show what measures can be taken in Guatemala to assure that the funds will be used for Cesar's benefit. The matter was continued to Friday April 24, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Meyers was directed to prepare and submit proposed orders, one for the approved withdrawals and one for the withdrawal of the entire account.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-13-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders the balance of this case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Helen Sorep-Matley. CSR 225. (212)

Compromise Of An Adult With Disability.
Off Calendar Mar-27-2008 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Compromise Of A Pending Action Of An Adult Person With A Disability.
Off Calendar Mar-04-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on Compromise of a Pending Action for an Adult Person with a Disability.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Jonathan E. Gertler, Esq. appeared with petitioner Oscar H. Barrera, who was present as Guardian ad litem for Cesar Barrera, an adult Claimant.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Alejandra Siroka was placed under oath and served as Spanish speaking interpreter for petitioner.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $1,025,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $297,644.98.
Medical Expenses $32,850.34.
A net balance of $694,504.70 to be deposited into a blocked account with Citibank, located at 130 Throckmorton Avenue, Mill Valley, CA 94941. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order.

Orders Approving Compromise of a Pending Action of an Adult Person with a Disability, and to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.
